text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English.
zh: 大家好,欢迎收听《Real Easy English》。

text: In this podcast, we have real conversations in Easy English to help you learn.
zh: 在这个播客节目中,我们用简单英语进行真实对话,帮助大家学习。

text: I'm Beth. And I'm Georgie. You can find a video version of this podcast and a worksheet to help you learn
zh: 我是Beth,我是Georgie。你可以找到这个播客的视频版本和一份学习用的练习单,

text: on our website bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 就在我们的网站bbclearningenglish.com上。

text: So how is your week going Georgie? It's going well, it's only Monday, I'm already quite tired. How about you Beth?
zh: Georgie,你这周过得怎么样?挺好的,才周一,我就已经挺累了。你呢,Beth?

text: I'm okay, I'm not tired yet but give me till this afternoon. So Beth, what are we talking about today?
zh: 我还好,还不累,不过等到今天下午再看看吧。那么Beth,我们今天聊什么话题?

text: we're going to talk about games, the kind of games we like playing, maybe games we don't like as much.
zh: 我们要聊聊游戏,聊聊我们喜欢玩的游戏类型,也许还有我们不太喜欢的游戏。

text: So shall we start the conversation? Yes, let's get started. So Beth, do you enjoy games?
zh: 那我们开始对话吧?好,开始吧。Beth,你喜欢玩游戏吗?

text: It depends on the kind of games. I think if it's something physical where you're,
zh: 这要看是什么类型的游戏。我觉得如果是一些运动型的,比如说,

text: I don't know, running around a park or being silly, sporty things, those kind of fun games I enjoy.
zh: 我也说不好,就是在公园里跑来跑去,或者做些傻乎乎的、运动性的事,那种有趣的游戏我喜欢。

text: but if it's like board games or card games, honestly, I don't really like them.
zh: 但如果是桌游或者纸牌游戏,说实话,我不太喜欢。

text: What about you? I do like games. I also like sporty games.
zh: 你呢?我确实喜欢游戏。我也喜欢运动类的游戏。

text: We did that in the park, didn't we, with our team? We did, we did.
zh: 我们不是在公园里跟我们的团队一起玩过吗?是啊,是啊。

text: Which was really fun and it's a good bonding experience.
zh: 那真的很好玩,也是一次不错的团队增进感情的体验。

text: But I, unlike you, do like card games and I enjoy playing them with friends in the pub.
zh: 但和你不一样,我确实喜欢纸牌游戏,我喜欢在酒吧和朋友们一起玩。

text: I can be quite awkward, So sometimes if I feel like I don't want to talk anymore,
zh: 我有时候会有点尴尬,所以有时候如果我不想再说话了,

text: I suggest a game and then we don't have to talk to people anymore.
zh: 我就会提议玩个游戏,这样我们就不用再跟别人聊天了。

text: I feel like if it's a card game where you have like a question and it's like, I don't know, you've got five seconds,
zh: 我觉得如果是那种带问题的纸牌游戏,比如说,你有五秒钟时间,

text: like name three modes of transport. Those kind of like talking, fun, laughing games with cards I enjoy.
zh: 要说出三种交通工具之类的。那种边聊天、边说笑、带纸牌的游戏我很喜欢。

text: But if it's something to do with the hearts and the diamond.
zh: 但如果是那种跟红心、方块有关的游戏,

text: and oh no i just think i'd rather have a conversation and just talk to my friends or whoever i'm with
zh: 哦不,我觉得我宁愿和朋友或者身边的人聊天。

text: okay so you don't like slow games so probably you wouldn't
zh: 好吧,所以你不喜欢节奏慢的游戏,那你大概也不会

text: like things like monopoly which go on for hours your whole evening
zh: 喜欢大富翁那种要玩上好几个小时、耗掉整晚的游戏。

text: honestly i think i had a bad experience as a child with monopoly
zh: 说实话,我小时候玩大富翁有过一次不太好的经历。

text: this game we we went away with all of our neighbors
zh: 就是那次,我们和所有邻居一起出去玩,

text: there were lots lots of people and we played a game of Monopoly and it lasted about I don't know five hours probably
zh: 那时候人特别多,我们玩了一局大富翁,大概持续了五个小时吧,不知道具体多久。

text: not that long yeah no probably Monopoly lasts for so long
zh: 没有那么长吧,是啊,不,大富翁大概确实会玩很久。

text: but also people get really aggressive and competitive with Monopoly don't they is that because people cheat
zh: 而且大家玩大富翁的时候都会变得特别有攻击性、特别好胜,对吧?是因为有人作弊吗?

text: um yeah well people can cheat yeah for sure um
zh: 嗯,是的,确实有人会作弊,这是肯定的。

text: but people get it's like they think the game is their real life and they get so angry and people lose friendships.
zh: 但大家会,就好像他们把游戏当成了真实生活一样,变得非常生气,还会因此失去朋友。

text: That is my house. Now you said cheat, what does that mean?
zh: 这是我的地盘。你刚才说“cheat”,那是什么意思?

text: Well, cheat is to kind of lie or say something that isn't true.
zh: “cheat”就是说谎,或者说一些不真实的话。

text: For example, you might pretend that you have something and actually you don't.
zh: 比如说,你可能假装自己拥有某样东西,而实际上并没有。

text: Cheating is seen as negative. Yes, it's like you're not following the rules as well.
zh: 作弊被认为是负面的行为。是的,而且这也意味着你没有遵守规则。

text: That's it. it yeah do you like cheating when i was a child
zh: 没错。那你小时候喜欢作弊吗?

text: i like to cheat but no because now it just feels dishonest if i if i win a game
zh: 我以前喜欢作弊,但现在不喜欢了,因为如果我赢了一局游戏,

text: i want to win because i actually was good enough or did well enough to win
zh: 我希望是因为我真的够好、表现得够出色才赢的。

text: yes are you a cheat i'm not a cheat because i think i'm i'm too much of a what we call a goody -goody,
zh: 是啊,那你是个爱作弊的人吗?我不是爱作弊的人,因为我觉得我太“乖”了,

text: someone who likes to follow the rules. So Georgie, a quiz is a type of game, I guess.
zh: 就是那种喜欢遵守规则的人。那么Georgie,我猜测验也是一种游戏吧。

text: Do you like quizzes? Yes, I also like quizzes.
zh: 你喜欢测验吗?是的,我也喜欢测验。

text: I used to go quite a lot to something we have a lot in the UK called a pub quiz,
zh: 我以前经常去参加一种在英国很常见的活动,叫“酒吧问答”,

text: where you go to a pub, there are lots of teams and you answer questions with your team.
zh: 就是你去一家酒吧,有很多队伍,你和你的队伍一起回答问题。

text: And I used to really enjoy that because A, you're socialising with your friends in the pub
zh: 我以前特别喜欢这个,因为第一,你可以在酒吧里和朋友们社交,

text: but I find it really satisfying when you get the questions right
zh: 而且当你答对问题时,会觉得特别有成就感。

text: I've actually won a couple of pub quizzes have you yeah
zh: 我其实赢过好几次酒吧问答呢。是吗?

text: well done it's really hard sometimes when all of the questions are general knowledge that you don't know anything about
zh: 真厉害。有时候题目全是通识常识题,而你什么都不知道,那就很难。

text: that's really boring but when you know the questions it's fun
zh: 那种时候真的挺无聊的,但当你知道答案的时候就很有意思。

text: Let's recap the vocabulary we had during the conversation.
zh: 我们来回顾一下这次对话中出现的词汇吧。

text: We had board games. These are games where players usually move pieces around a flat board like
zh: 我们讲到了“board games”(桌游),这是指玩家通常在一个平面棋盘上移动棋子的游戏,比如

text: chess. We had quiz which is a game where you answer questions.
zh: 国际象棋。我们还讲到了“quiz”(测验),就是回答问题的一种游戏。

text: Cheat means to be dishonest when playing a game
zh: “cheat”意思是在玩游戏时不诚实、耍花招,

text: and you can also call a person a cheat if they are dishonest in a game.
zh: 你也可以用“cheat”来形容一个在游戏中不诚实的人。

text: We had Goody which is someone who likes following rules like me.
zh: 我们还讲到了“goody”,指那种喜欢遵守规则的人,比如我。

text: And you can do a quiz on our website go to bbclearningenglish .com and you'll also find a worksheet there
zh: 你可以在我们的网站上做一个小测验,访问bbclearningenglish.com,你还会在那里找到一份练习单,

text: so you can test what you've learnt. See you then, bye!
zh: 可以检验一下你学到了什么。下次再见,拜拜!
